descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average dimension of crystalline grains in material
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical properties and deformation behavior

quality.loss_reason: collapses full size distribution to single average
quality.truncation_error: distribution variance and shape information lost
quality.notes: cannot reconstruct original grain size distribution

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic angle differences across grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary energy and mechanical response

quality.truncation_error: bin resolution limits and boundary axis information
quality.notes: misses full misorientation axis and rotation details

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.rationale: affects anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

quality.loss_reason: reduces full orientation distribution to single number
quality.truncation_error: all spatial and orientation component information lost
quality.notes: different texture types yield same intensity value

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: elongation of grains along preferred direction
descriptors.rationale: indicates deformation history and directional properties

quality.loss_reason: averages distribution and loses orientation information
quality.truncation_error: grain orientation direction and distribution variance lost

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: controls diffusion pathways and mechanical strength

quality.loss_reason: loses grain topology and size distribution
quality.truncation_error: grain connectivity and morphology details missing
quality.notes: redundant with grain size if correlated

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: determines work hardening and plastic flow behavior

quality.loss_reason: averages spatial and type distribution information
quality.truncation_error: dislocation character and arrangement patterns lost
quality.notes: ignores edge versus screw character distribution

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of recrystallized versus deformed grains
descriptors.rationale: tracks microstructure evolution during thermal processing

quality.loss_reason: loses spatial distribution and nucleation site information
quality.truncation_error: grain-level state and spatial clustering lost
quality.notes: uniform descriptor but misses transformation kinetics detail

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of boundaries by coincident site lattice
descriptors.rationale: special boundaries affect properties like corrosion resistance

quality.truncation_error: exact misorientation and boundary plane lost
quality.notes: captures key features for engineering properties

descriptors.name: subgrain density
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of subgrain boundaries per unit volume

quality.truncation_error: subgrain size distribution and 3D structure lost

descriptors.name: kernel average misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: local orientation gradient indicating deformation intensity
descriptors.rationale: maps spatially-resolved strain and defect distribution

quality.loss_reason: spatial averaging and binning reduce resolution
quality.truncation_error: fine-scale features and absolute orientations lost
quality.notes: retains spatial heterogeneity better than scalar

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: proportion of boundaries with twin relationship
descriptors.rationale: twins affect mechanical behavior and texture evolution

quality.loss_reason: collapses twin type and spatial distribution
quality.truncation_error: coherent versus incoherent twins not distinguished
quality.notes: subset of grain boundary character distribution
